title: myristica elliptica var. celebica
intro: Myristica elliptica var. celebica, also known as the Celebes nutmeg myrtle, is a species of plant in the family Myristicaceae, native to Sulawesi, Indonesia. The plant's seeds have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Celebes nutmeg myrtle include its potential to aid in digestion, relieve pain and swelling, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the seeds are often used in traditional medicine to make tonics, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
